html:
Exclusive to:

For detailed farming informations, see Farm Plant.

The Garlic Plant is an object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Reap What You Sow update. It can be obtained by planting Seed Pods (also named Garlic Seeds, if researched with the Gardeneer Hat) into Farm Soil or on the ground as Wormwood. There is a chance to grow a Garlic Plant by planting regular Seeds.

All seasons are this plant’s favorites, so it won’t accumulate additional stress points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 Garlic and 0-2 Seed Pods/Garlic Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a Giant Garlic, if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and hammered, it will drop 2-3 Garlics and 2-3 Seed Pods/Garlic Seeds.

The Garlic stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Garlic stays 6 Days on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 Rot (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Garlic Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Garlic Plant grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a Fruit Fly has a 5% chance to spawn.

Gallery

  • Garlic Plant in Plant Registry.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

{{for|detailed farming informations|Farm Plant}}
The '''Garlic Plant''' is an object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[Reap What You Sow]]'' update. It can be obtained by planting [[Crop Seeds/DST#Seed Pods|Seed Pods]] (also named Garlic Seeds, if researched with the [[Gardeneer Hat]]) into [[Farm Soil]] or on the ground as [[Wormwood]]. There is a chance to grow a Garlic Plant by planting regular [[Seeds]].

All seasons are this plant’s favorites, so it won’t accumulate additional stress points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 [[Garlic]] and 0-2 Seed Pods/Garlic Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a [[Giant Crops#Giant Garlic|Giant Garlic]], if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and [[hammer]]ed, it will drop 2-3 Garlics and 2-3 Seed Pods/Garlic Seeds.

The Garlic stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Garlic stays 6 [[Day]]s on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 [[Rot]] (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Garlic Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Garlic Plant grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a [[Fruit Fly]] has a 5% chance to spawn.
